title: Verify 'Warn me before exiting' toggle switch functionality
test_steps: Navigate to the Settings screen. | Tap on the 'Warn me before exiting' toggle switch. | Verify that the toggle switch changes its state. | Tap on the 'Warn me before exiting' toggle switch again to revert to the original state.
expected_result: The toggle switch should change its state when tapped. | The toggle switch should revert to the original state when tapped again.
